what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon showing a document with a folded corner and a play triangle inside, using currentColor stroke styling.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill.
Stroke is set to currentColor with 1.5 width and rounded caps and joins.
The document outline is drawn as a single path with a folded top-right corner indicated by a second path.
A triangular play symbol is drawn inside the document shape.
standouts: Combines file/document and video/play motifs in one icon.
Uses only path elements and inherits color from surrounding text or CSS.
conventions: Follows a common outline icon convention with viewBox 0 0 24 24, fill none, currentColor stroke, and rounded stroke joins.
notes: This is a reusable stroked outline file-video icon asset.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename's implied file-video purpose matches the document-with-play-symbol SVG content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to represent a video file in a design system or UI icon set while remaining color-agnostic and scalable.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable SVG representation of a video file concept for use wherever a fused system needs document media-type iconography.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a folded-corner file containing a play triangle.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing video-file content as a reusable design-system icon.
